attributes.title: [Memcached OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of Memcached cache health and performance: hit ratio, evictions, connections, memory usage, command throughput, and CPU.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"panelIndex": "887981e6-1ee5-4087-096b-af81cff49944", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 16, "h": 12, "i": "887981e6-1ee5-4087-096b-af81cff49944"}, "type": "visualization", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "savedVis": {"type": "markdown", "id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [Memcached OTel] Overview

This dashboard monitors Memcached cache health and performance:
- **Hit ratio** — cache effectiveness (higher is better; spec bug: OTel reports miss ratio, we show 100 - miss)
- **Evictions** — memory pressure indicator (rising evictions = memory saturated)
- **Connections** — current open connections and connection rate
- **Memory** — bytes used for item storage
- **Command throughput** — get/set/flush/touch rates
- **CPU usage** — cumulative CPU time (rate indicates load)
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "5b6a7391-99b4-5aa7-62f9-05699e4e556a", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 0, "w": 8, "h": 4, "i": "5b6a7391-99b4-5aa7-62f9-05699e4e556a"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Hit Ratio (get)", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "85fa7949-4a40-68d2-a95b-d8c59f4b1251", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "0b564a99-e25b-db44-2a3c-e9f626e4eda5", "showBar": false}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-memcachedreceiver.otel*
| WHERE memcached.operation_hit_ratio IS NOT NULL
  AND (operation == "get" OR attributes.operation == "get")
| STATS miss_ratio = AVG(memcached.operation_hit_ratio)
| EVAL hit_ratio = (100 - miss_ratio) / 100"}, "filters": [], "datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"85fa7949-4a40-68d2-a95b-d8c59f4b1251": {"query": {"esql": "TS metrics-memcachedreceiver.otel*
